title: Velvet Wired Ribbon with Glitter Snowflake for Christmas Tree Decorations, Gift Wrapping, Wreath Bow Making,DIY Crafts, 6.3cm x 10 Yards (White)
features: PREMIUM & LUXURIOUS DESIGN – Elevate your décor with this elegant velvet ribbon featuring shimmering glitter snowflakes and a gold backing. The rich texture and lustrous finish add warmth and sophistication to any holiday setting.

GENEROUS 10-YARD LENGTH – Each 2.5-inch-wide roll provides 10yards of high-quality ribbon, giving you plenty of material to craft stunning bows, wreaths, and more. Perfect for making a bold statement in your holiday designs!

WIRED EDGES FOR EASY SHAPING – The flexible wired edges allow effortless bending and shaping, so you can create flawless bows, garlands, and intricate decorations. No fraying—just smooth, professional-looking results every time!

PERFECT FOR FESTIVE & WINTER THEMES – The snowflake pattern brings a magical winter wonderland vibe to your décor. Ideal for Christmas trees, gift wrapping, bow making,mantels, wreaths, and floral arrangements—spreading holiday cheer in style!

VERSATILE HOLIDAY DECOR & CRAFTING – From stairway banisters to xmas tree wraps, this ribbon enhances every project. A must-have for DIY enthusiasts, adding a touch of elegance to gifts, parties, and farmhouse or rustic-themed celebrations!
description: Transform your holiday decorating with this luxurious velvet wired ribbon adorned with sparkling glitter snowflakes. Measuring 6.3 centimetres in width and spanning a generous 10 yards in length, this versatile ribbon brings a touch of winter wonderland magic to your festive creations. The wired edges offer superior control for crafting perfect bows and maintaining crisp shapes in your designs. Perfect for adding a sophisticated flourish to Christmas trees, creating stunning wreaths, or elevating your gift wrapping to new heights. The rich velvet texture combined with the shimmer of glitter snowflakes creates an eye-catching contrast that catches light beautifully. Whether you're a seasoned crafter or simply looking to add elegant finishing touches to your holiday décor, this ribbon's premium quality and versatile nature make it an essential addition to your Christmas crafting supplies.
